channel.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2022
item.description:
Game Development

  • jme-cljstars115 - A Clojure 3D Game Engine (Wrapper), Powered by jMonkeyEngine
  • play-cljcstars442 - A Clojure and ClojureScript game library

    • Async processing

  • goosestars106

    • Graphviz

  • re-frame-flowstars134 - Graph based visualization tool for re-frame event chains (ClojureScript)

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Protocol Buffers and gRPC

  • prontostars45
  • lein-protodepsstars19

    • Rule-based Programming

  • O'Doyle Rulesstars407

    • Build Automation and Package management

  • tools.build

    • Testing

  • StateFlowstars246

    • Video tutorials

    YouTube

  • Clojure Pills screencast: Fun and beginner friendly content related to the overall clojure ecosystem

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Dependency injection

  • darkleaf/distars17

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Oct 25th - Oct 31st, 2021
item.description:
Awesome macros usage

  • core.asyncstars1.9k - transforms AST into CSP programs
  • cloroutinestars195 - suspends and continuations (coroutines)
  • missionarystars413 - a reactive dataflow programming toolkit
  • photonstars5 - realtime web, like Meteor, but for Clojure(Script)
  • metacljstars73 - staged compilation
  • meanderstars788 - transparent data transformation using datastructure pattermatching
  • proteusstars104 - introduce mutable variables (don't use, just learn how to map your mind into immutable world)

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Oct 11th - Oct 17th, 2021
item.description:
Advanced datastructures

  • meanderstars788: transparent data transformation (defined as pattern-matching)

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Sep 20th - Sep 26th, 2021
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • scicloj.mlstars127

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Sep 6th - Sep 12th, 2021
item.description:
Database

  • xtdbstars2k: bitemporal database for SQL, Datalog & graph queries

    • HTTP

  • hatostars285 : An HTTP client for Clojure, wrapping JDK 11's HttpClient

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Aug 30th - Sep 5th, 2021
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • clj-synapsesstars0

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Jul 26th - Aug 1st, 2021
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • clj-grpcstars10

    • Editor Plugins

  • Notepad++stars18: modified config files of Lisp

    • Advanced datastructures

  • Duratomstars175: persisted atoms

    • Version Control Management

  • clj-jgitstars234

    • GUI

  • fx-cljstars106

    • Database

  • Monger: for MongoDB
  • Monglorious: for MongoDB
  • clj-rethinkdbstars199: for RethinkDB
  • Revisestars146: for RethinkDB
  • Spandexstars224: for ElasticSearch
  • Elastisch: for ElasticSearch
  • neocons: for Neo4j
  • Aliastars231: for Cassandra
  • aerospike-cljstars28: for Aerospike

    • Security

  • boltstars124

    • Data Validation

  • domaintypesstars5

    • Pattern Matching

  • Verbal-Exprejonstars93

    • Machine Learning

  • neanderthalstars979: fast matrix library
  • clojurecudastars165
  • clojureclstars272
  • bayaderastars354: bayesian data analysis on the GPU
  • Flarestars282
  • MXNet - Clojure API
  • clj-mlstars147
  • Claternstars67
  • k9stars102
  • Statistikerstars63
  • Synapticstars90
  • Inferstars176

    • Computer Vision

  • origamistars91: OpenCV 4 wrapper

    • Documentation

  • codoxstars637

    • Terminal UI

  • clojure-lanternastars203

    • Exercises

  • rich4clojurestars142

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
HTTP

  • clj-httpstars1.7k : Apache HttpComponents client wrapper
  • http-kitstars2.3k : Simple, high-performance event-driven HTTP client and server
  • ringstars3.5k : HTTP server abstraction
  • kvltstars70 : Uniform, asychronous client interface for HTTP across JVM / Node / browsers
  • alephstars2.4k : Async client/server based on Netty, with defaults for HTTP, TCP and UDP

    • Dependency injection

  • clipstars203

    • Date and Time

  • tickstars521: Clojure(Script) library, intended as replacement for clj-time

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Video tutorials

YouTube

  • Clojure Tutorials by Timothy Baldridge: More advanced videos on core.async, transducers, transients, logic programming and a "Function of the day" series.

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Advanced datastructures

  • bifurcanstars914: linear map/set/list (stores entries contiguously in memory), ;writtern in java, but test suite (read: usage examples) in clojure
  • Persistent AVL treesstars118: persistent sorted maps and sets with log-time rank queries
  • Finger Treestars211: double-list, counted-double-list, counted-sorted-set
  • Hitchhiker Treestars1.2k: create fast, snapshottable, massively scalable databases
  • Hierarchical setstars7
  • Orderedstars227: ordered sets and maps
  • Lazy Mapstars47: whose values are only calculated when accessed
  • Durable Queuestars368: queue persisted on disk

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Monads

  • Fluokittenstars436

    • Science and Data Analysis

  • Bayadera - Bayesian Data Analysis on the GPUstars354
  • ClojureCUDAstars165
  • Neanderthal - fast matrix and linear algebrastars979
  • ClojureCL - parallel computations with OpenCLstars272

    • Web Framework

  • Compojure-apistars1.1k
  • Reititstars1.2k

    • JSON

  • jsonistastars359

    • RESTful API

  • Compojure-apistars1.1k
  • reititstars1.2k

    • Async processing

  • manifoldstars930

    • WebSocket

  • alephstars2.4k

    • Editor Plugins

  • Calva (VSCode)stars1.2k

item.title: razum2um/awesome-clojure Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • dl4clj (deeplearning4j to clojure)stars100
  • clojure-tensorflowstars109

    • Video tutorials

    YouTube

  • Misophistful's channel: Understand concepts such as list comprehension, threading macros, generative testing, destructuring, core.match and introductions to Light Table, Datomic and Game development with Clojure
  • Fred Overflow's channel: Introductions to Functional programming and TDD with Clojure
  • Clojure Pills screencast: Introduction to Clojure one function at a time
  • Data persistance with Postgres, Clojure and JDBC
